_comment: Write the battery current scale factor computed by the operator/wizard from measured-vs-reported current. The descriptor declares `scale`; this body forwards it to the Layer 0 command by reference. Stack converters map to BATT_AMP_PERVLT (ArduPilot) / BAT_A_PER_V (PX4) and validate read-back.

then.detail: Battery current scale write was accepted but read-back did not match.
Battery current scale parameter write was rejected by the autopilot.
Battery current calibration cancelled by operator.
Battery current calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
